zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore Durvassal於1325年出生在英國武斯特斯爾亞德利時，她的父親Nicholas Durvassal22歲，母親Rose de Montfort18歲。她於1351年與John Holt在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianore Durvassal于1325年出生在英国武斯特斯爾亞德利时，她的父亲Nicholas Durvassal22岁，母亲Rose de Montfort18岁。她于1351年与John Holt在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年在她的家乡享年75岁。

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore Durvassal was born in 1325, in Yardley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Nicholas Durvassal, was 22 and her mother, Rose de Montfort, was 18. She married John Holt in 1351, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1400, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore Durvassal est née en 1325, à Yardley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Durvassal, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Rose de Montfort, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Holt en 1351, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianore Durvassal 1325 in Yardley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Durvassal 22 und ihre Mutter Rose de Montfort 18. Sie hat 1351 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom John Holt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore Durvassal è nata il nel 1325 nel Yardley, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Nicholas Durvassal, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Rose de Montfort, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Holt nel 1351, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1400, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianore Durvassalが1325年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアヤードリーで生まれた時，父Nicholas Durvassalは22歳，母Rose de Montfortは18歳であった。1351年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでJohn Holtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianore Durvassal(이)가 1325년 영국 워스스터실르 야어들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Durvassal(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose de Montfort(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 John Holt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Coughton, Warwick, England: Coughton, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore Durvassal nasceu em 1325, em Yardley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Durvassal, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Rose de Montfort, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Holt em 1351, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore Durvassal родилась в 1325 г. в местности ярдли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Durvassal было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Rose de Montfort, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Holt в 1351 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1400 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianore Durvassal nació en 1325, en Yardley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Durvassal, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Rose de Montfort, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Holt en 1351, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1400, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
